security: Gallery path-traversal checks must use `resolved.startsWith(dir + path.sep)` not bare startsWith — the delete path repeatedly re-introduces the bug the read path was hardened against
vlmApiUrl from PUT /api/config needs scheme allowlist (http/https only) and loopback restriction before handleVlmTest fetches it server-side (SSRF oracle)
All error responses (caption/upload/config/model-check) must return a generic string, not err.message/stderr — server-side log the detail
Add X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff, X-Frame-Options, and a restrictive CSP to every Bun.serve Response since /output/ serves user-influenced bytes
caption/selftest handlers bypass buildCliArgs — validate style/prompt/test_name against an allowlist or charset regex and reject leading-dash values before pushing into argv
correctness: lib/paths.ts resolves OUTPUT_DIRS/MODELS_DIR/UPLOAD_DIR at import time — convert them to functions (getOutputDirs()) so config PUT takes effect without restart
subprocess.ts readStream must carry a leftover buffer across reader.read() chunks and only emit newline-terminated lines; flush the tail on stream done
Guard proc.stdout/proc.stderr with null checks before .getReader() — spawn failures leave them null and the sync throw escapes the try/catch
WS 'open' handler replays ALL running jobs' buffered logs to every new client and hard-codes stream:'stdout' — filter by subscribedJobId and forward line.stream
API routes.ts SPA fallback condition `!pathname.startsWith("/api/")` is always-true dead logic (all /api/ already returned above) — simplify or it masks missing-asset 404s
type-safety: Bun.serve fetch/upgrade handler `server` param is typed `any` — type it as `Server` from "bun" (call site passes Bun.Server)
ServerWebSocket handler params and connectedClients Set are typed `any` — import ServerWebSocket<WsData> from "bun" and define a WsData interface
readStream's `reader` param is typed `any` — use ReadableStreamDefaultReader<Uint8Array>
Response.json catch blocks use `err: any` then access err.message — narrow to `err: unknown` with `err instanceof Error` guard to avoid swallowing non-Error throws
error-handling: readStream's bare `catch { /* stream closed */ }` swallows reader errors and drops the unterminated final line — flush textDecoder.decode() on exit
handleDeleteJob calls killJob (cancel) but is named/used as delete — non-running jobs 404 instead of being removed from history
selftest job.selfTestHtmlPath marker is joined raw into path/URL — normalize via path.basename before lookup
code-quality: OUTPUT_DIRS.indexOf(entry.dir) uses reference equality on resolved path strings — use a Map for stable dir-index lookup
ensureUploadDir() uses require('fs') (CJS) while the file uses ESM import, and is never called — delete the dead function
Duplicate WebSocket connections: useJobs, ConfigView, and Layout each open their own /ws — refactor to a shared WS singleton/context

false_positives: SPA fallback dead-code/redundant condition in api/routes.ts — flagged as correctness in 4 of 5 runs but rejected each time; the always-true fallback IS the intended SPA catch-all behavior, not a bug (functional, by design)
ensureUploadDir() require('fs') dead code in lib/paths.ts — flagged in 2 runs but it is dead (never called) and harmless; low-value cleanup, not a correctness defect
loadConfig() in-memory cache never re-reads disk — flagged once as a stale-config bug but it is an intentional design choice (saveConfig updates the same cache), only matters for external edits
useSchemaDefaults one-render flash on action remount with populated cache — flagged as correctness but self-corrects on the next effect tick; cosmetic only
Gallery OUTPUT_DIRS.indexOf reference-equality fragility — flagged in 3 runs but works correctly because entry.dir is literally the same array element; no actual divergence path

recurring_findings.last_fix_status: race finalized-flag fix applied 2026-06-12T21-18-29; newline-split + null-check recurred after

err.message / stderr forwarded verbatim to client
OUTPUT_DIRS/MODELS_DIR resolved at import time, stale after config update

recurring_findings.last_fix_status: intentional design — rejected each time (false positive)

recurring_findings.title_fragment: WS upgrade accepts any origin / no CSRF

unstable_fixes.note: Read/serving path was hardened in 2026-06-12T21-18-29 with dir+path.sep, but the delete path (tryDelete) re-introduced the identical bare-startsWith bug — same file, mirrored handler, fix not propagated

Finalizer-flag fix applied 2026-06-12T21-18-29, but the file kept producing NEW correctness findings (getReader null check, newline-split, stream-drain) in all 3 subsequent runs — the file is a persistent hotspot needing holistic review
Origin validation added 2026-06-12T21-18-29 but 2026-06-14T03-24-15 re-flagged it as fail-open (allows absent Origin header) — fix was incomplete, not fail-closed
